timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Railways
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of railways, from early wagonways to high-speed and magnetic-levitation rail transport.
title: Wooden wagonways spread in mining districts
description: Early wooden wagonways begin to be used in Central European mining regions, creating a practical foundation for later rail transport.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Railways
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of railways, from early wagonways to high-speed and magnetic-levitation rail transport.
title: Cugnot builds a steam road vehicle
description: Nicolas-Joseph Cugnot demonstrates a steam-powered vehicle, an important precursor in the broader history of mechanized transport.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Railways
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of railways, from early wagonways to high-speed and magnetic-levitation rail transport.
title: Penydarren locomotive runs on rails
description: Richard Trevithick's steam locomotive hauls iron and passengers at Penydarren, marking a landmark in locomotive development.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Railways
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of railways, from early wagonways to high-speed and magnetic-levitation rail transport.
title: Salamanca enters commercial service
description: Matthew Murray's Salamanca begins work on the Middleton Railway and becomes one of the first commercially successful steam locomotives.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Railways
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of railways, from early wagonways to high-speed and magnetic-levitation rail transport.
title: Stockton and Darlington Railway opens
description: The Stockton and Darlington Railway opens and becomes the first public railway to use steam locomotives for freight and passenger traffic.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Railways
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of railways, from early wagonways to high-speed and magnetic-levitation rail transport.
title: Rocket wins the Rainhill Trials
description: George and Robert Stephenson's Rocket triumphs in the Rainhill Trials and helps establish the locomotive model for future railways.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Railways
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of railways, from early wagonways to high-speed and magnetic-levitation rail transport.
title: Liverpool and Manchester Railway opens
description: The Liverpool and Manchester Railway opens as the first fully scheduled intercity railway operated by steam locomotives.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Railways
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of railways, from early wagonways to high-speed and magnetic-levitation rail transport.
title: Great Western Railway reaches London and Bristol
description: The Great Western Railway completes its main route between London and Bristol, expanding long-distance rail travel in Britain.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Railways
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of railways, from early wagonways to high-speed and magnetic-levitation rail transport.
title: London Underground begins operation
description: The Metropolitan Railway opens in London, creating the world's first underground urban railway.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Railways
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of railways, from early wagonways to high-speed and magnetic-levitation rail transport.
title: First U.S. transcontinental railroad is completed
description: The driving of the Golden Spike at Promontory Summit links the American transcontinental railroad system.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Railways
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of railways, from early wagonways to high-speed and magnetic-levitation rail transport.
title: Orient Express begins service
description: The Orient Express starts running between Paris and eastern Europe, becoming an emblem of luxury international rail travel.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Railways
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of railways, from early wagonways to high-speed and magnetic-levitation rail transport.
title: City and South London Railway electrifies deep-level transit
description: The City and South London Railway opens as the first successful deep-level electric underground railway.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Railways
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of railways, from early wagonways to high-speed and magnetic-levitation rail transport.
title: New York City subway opens
description: New York opens its first subway line, expanding the model of rapid urban rail transit on a massive scale.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Railways
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of railways, from early wagonways to high-speed and magnetic-levitation rail transport.
title: Zephyr showcases streamlined diesel rail travel
description: The Burlington Zephyr demonstrates the commercial promise of streamlined diesel-powered passenger trains.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Railways
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of railways, from early wagonways to high-speed and magnetic-levitation rail transport.
title: Shinkansen begins high-speed service
description: Japan opens the Tokaido Shinkansen between Tokyo and Osaka, inaugurating the modern age of high-speed rail.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Railways
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of railways, from early wagonways to high-speed and magnetic-levitation rail transport.
title: TGV enters service in France
description: France launches Train a Grande Vitesse service, helping to globalize high-speed rail as a transport model.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Railways
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of railways, from early wagonways to high-speed and magnetic-levitation rail transport.
title: Channel Tunnel opens to rail traffic
description: The Channel Tunnel opens, creating a fixed rail link between Great Britain and continental Europe.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Railways
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of railways, from early wagonways to high-speed and magnetic-levitation rail transport.
title: Shanghai maglev opens
description: Shanghai begins commercial operation of a high-speed magnetic-levitation rail line.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Railways
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of railways, from early wagonways to high-speed and magnetic-levitation rail transport.
title: Beijing-Tianjin high-speed railway opens
description: China opens a dedicated high-speed line between Beijing and Tianjin, a major step in the rapid expansion of its national network.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Railways
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of railways, from early wagonways to high-speed and magnetic-levitation rail transport.
title: Elizabeth line opens in London
description: London opens the Elizabeth line, one of Europe's largest recent urban rail projects and a major addition to cross-city rail capacity.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Theory of Evolution
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of evolutionary theory, from early classification and transformist ideas to modern genetics and genomic evidence.
title: Linnaeus publishes Systema Naturae
description: Carl Linnaeus introduces a systematic method of classifying living things, shaping later debates about commonality and difference among species.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Theory of Evolution
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of evolutionary theory, from early classification and transformist ideas to modern genetics and genomic evidence.
title: Buffon begins Histoire naturelle
description: Georges-Louis Leclerc, comte de Buffon, publishes the first volumes of Histoire naturelle and questions fixed views of species and Earth's age.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Theory of Evolution
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of evolutionary theory, from early classification and transformist ideas to modern genetics and genomic evidence.
title: Erasmus Darwin publishes Zoonomia
description: Erasmus Darwin presents early evolutionary ideas about the transformation of living forms.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Theory of Evolution
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of evolutionary theory, from early classification and transformist ideas to modern genetics and genomic evidence.
title: Malthus publishes Essay on Population
description: Thomas Robert Malthus's essay later influences Charles Darwin's thinking about competition and survival.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Theory of Evolution
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of evolutionary theory, from early classification and transformist ideas to modern genetics and genomic evidence.
title: Lamarck publishes Philosophie zoologique
description: Jean-Baptiste Lamarck offers one of the first coherent theories of species transformation.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Theory of Evolution
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of evolutionary theory, from early classification and transformist ideas to modern genetics and genomic evidence.
title: Lyell begins Principles of Geology
description: Charles Lyell argues for gradual geological change over deep time, strengthening the temporal framework needed for evolution.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Theory of Evolution
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of evolutionary theory, from early classification and transformist ideas to modern genetics and genomic evidence.
title: Darwin sails on HMS Beagle
description: Charles Darwin departs on the Beagle voyage, gathering observations that later contribute to his theory of evolution by natural selection.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Theory of Evolution
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of evolutionary theory, from early classification and transformist ideas to modern genetics and genomic evidence.
title: Darwin formulates natural selection
description: After reading Malthus, Darwin develops the core idea of natural selection as a mechanism of evolutionary change.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Theory of Evolution
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of evolutionary theory, from early classification and transformist ideas to modern genetics and genomic evidence.
title: Darwin and Wallace papers are presented
description: Papers by Charles Darwin and Alfred Russel Wallace on natural selection are presented to the Linnean Society of London.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Theory of Evolution
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of evolutionary theory, from early classification and transformist ideas to modern genetics and genomic evidence.
title: On the Origin of Species is published
description: Darwin publishes On the Origin of Species, the foundational text of modern evolutionary biology.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Theory of Evolution
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of evolutionary theory, from early classification and transformist ideas to modern genetics and genomic evidence.
title: Mendel presents work on inheritance
description: Gregor Mendel reports experimental results on inheritance in pea plants, laying a foundation for later evolutionary genetics.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Theory of Evolution
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of evolutionary theory, from early classification and transformist ideas to modern genetics and genomic evidence.
title: Weismann advances germ-plasm theory
description: August Weismann argues against the inheritance of acquired characteristics and strengthens a heredity-based account of evolution.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Theory of Evolution
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of evolutionary theory, from early classification and transformist ideas to modern genetics and genomic evidence.
title: Mendel's work is rediscovered
description: Researchers including Hugo de Vries, Carl Correns, and Erich von Tschermak revive Mendelian genetics, reshaping evolutionary debate.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Theory of Evolution
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of evolutionary theory, from early classification and transformist ideas to modern genetics and genomic evidence.
title: Hardy-Weinberg principle is formulated
description: G. H. Hardy and Wilhelm Weinberg show how allele frequencies behave under ideal conditions, creating a baseline for population genetics.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Theory of Evolution
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of evolutionary theory, from early classification and transformist ideas to modern genetics and genomic evidence.
title: Fisher unites Mendelian genetics and biometrics
description: R. A. Fisher's work on the correlation between relatives helps bridge discrete inheritance and continuous variation.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Theory of Evolution
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of evolutionary theory, from early classification and transformist ideas to modern genetics and genomic evidence.
title: Fisher publishes The Genetical Theory of Natural Selection
description: Fisher deepens the mathematical basis of evolutionary theory and helps establish population genetics.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Theory of Evolution
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of evolutionary theory, from early classification and transformist ideas to modern genetics and genomic evidence.
title: Dobzhansky publishes Genetics and the Origin of Species
description: Theodosius Dobzhansky's book becomes a central text in the modern evolutionary synthesis.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Theory of Evolution
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of evolutionary theory, from early classification and transformist ideas to modern genetics and genomic evidence.
title: Huxley names the modern synthesis
description: Julian Huxley publishes Evolution: The Modern Synthesis, consolidating genetics, systematics, and natural selection into a common framework.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Theory of Evolution
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of evolutionary theory, from early classification and transformist ideas to modern genetics and genomic evidence.
title: DNA double helix is described
description: James Watson and Francis Crick, drawing on key evidence including Rosalind Franklin's work, describe the structure of DNA and transform evolutionary biology.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Theory of Evolution
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of evolutionary theory, from early classification and transformist ideas to modern genetics and genomic evidence.
title: Kimura proposes neutral theory
description: Motoo Kimura introduces the neutral theory of molecular evolution, expanding debate over the causes of genetic change.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Labor Movement

timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of organized labor, trade unionism, and workers' rights in the modern world.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Labor Movement
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of organized labor, trade unionism, and workers' rights in the modern world.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Labor Movement

timeline_title: Timeline of the Labor Movement
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of organized labor, trade unionism, and workers' rights in the modern world.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Labor Movement
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of organized labor, trade unionism, and workers' rights in the modern world.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Labor Movement
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of organized labor, trade unionism, and workers' rights in the modern world.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Labor Movement
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of organized labor, trade unionism, and workers' rights in the modern world.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Labor Movement
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of organized labor, trade unionism, and workers' rights in the modern world.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Labor Movement
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of organized labor, trade unionism, and workers' rights in the modern world.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Labor Movement
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of organized labor, trade unionism, and workers' rights in the modern world.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Labor Movement

timeline_title: Timeline of the Labor Movement

timeline_title: Timeline of the Labor Movement

timeline_title: Timeline of the Labor Movement

timeline_title: Timeline of the Labor Movement
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of organized labor, trade unionism, and workers' rights in the modern world.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Labor Movement
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of organized labor, trade unionism, and workers' rights in the modern world.

timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the development of organized labor, trade unionism, and workers' rights in the modern world.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Labor Movement

timeline_title: Timeline of Robotics
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the history of robotics, from early automata to industrial, service, and planetary robots.

timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the history of robotics, from early automata to industrial, service, and planetary robots.

timeline_title: Timeline of Robotics
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the history of robotics, from early automata to industrial, service, and planetary robots.

description: Researchers at SRI launch work on Shakey, an early mobile robot able to perceive and reason about its environment.

timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the history of robotics, from early automata to industrial, service, and planetary robots.

description: Waseda University introduces WABOT-1, often described as the first full-scale humanoid robot.

timeline_title: Timeline of Robotics
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the history of robotics, from early automata to industrial, service, and planetary robots.

description: A PUMA robotic arm is used in a surgical procedure, signaling the future importance of medical robotics.

timeline_title: Timeline of Robotics
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the history of robotics, from early automata to industrial, service, and planetary robots.

description: Honda starts a long-term research program that eventually produces the ASIMO humanoid robot line.

timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the history of robotics, from early automata to industrial, service, and planetary robots.
title: Sojourner explores Mars
description: NASA's Sojourner rover operates on Mars, proving the value of robotic planetary exploration.

timeline_title: Timeline of Robotics
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the history of robotics, from early automata to industrial, service, and planetary robots.
title: ASIMO is introduced
description: Honda unveils ASIMO, a widely recognized humanoid robot capable of walking and interacting in structured settings.

timeline_title: Timeline of Robotics
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the history of robotics, from early automata to industrial, service, and planetary robots.
title: Roomba enters consumer markets
description: The Roomba helps normalize domestic service robots for mass consumers.

timeline_title: Timeline of Robotics
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the history of robotics, from early automata to industrial, service, and planetary robots.
title: DARPA Grand Challenge accelerates autonomous vehicles
description: DARPA's desert race stimulates rapid innovation in robotic navigation and self-driving systems.

timeline_title: Timeline of Robotics
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the history of robotics, from early automata to industrial, service, and planetary robots.
title: Baxter popularizes collaborative industrial robotics
description: Rethink Robotics launches Baxter, drawing new attention to collaborative robots designed to work near people.

timeline_title: Timeline of Robotics
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the history of robotics, from early automata to industrial, service, and planetary robots.
title: Ingenuity makes powered flight on Mars
description: NASA's Ingenuity helicopter completes the first powered flight on another planet, expanding the scope of robotic exploration.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Bretton Woods System
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the creation, operation, and dissolution of the Bretton Woods international monetary system and its institutional legacy.
title: Gold Reserve Act restructures U.S. gold policy
description: The United States centralizes gold holdings and revalues gold, a major precondition for later wartime and postwar monetary planning.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Bretton Woods System
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the creation, operation, and dissolution of the Bretton Woods international monetary system and its institutional legacy.
title: Allied monetary planning intensifies
description: British and American officials begin detailed wartime negotiations over the shape of a postwar monetary order.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Bretton Woods System
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the creation, operation, and dissolution of the Bretton Woods international monetary system and its institutional legacy.
title: Bretton Woods Conference is held
description: Delegates from 44 countries meet at Bretton Woods and agree on the framework for a postwar monetary system based on fixed but adjustable exchange rates.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Bretton Woods System
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the creation, operation, and dissolution of the Bretton Woods international monetary system and its institutional legacy.
title: IMF and World Bank articles enter into force
description: The required number of countries ratify the agreements, bringing the International Monetary Fund and International Bank for Reconstruction and Development into existence.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Bretton Woods System
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the creation, operation, and dissolution of the Bretton Woods international monetary system and its institutional legacy.
title: Savannah conference launches operations
description: Delegates meet in Savannah, Georgia, to arrange the initial operations of the IMF and World Bank.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Bretton Woods System
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the creation, operation, and dissolution of the Bretton Woods international monetary system and its institutional legacy.
title: World Bank makes its first loan
description: The World Bank extends its first loan, to France, as the new postwar financial architecture begins functioning in practice.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Bretton Woods System
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the creation, operation, and dissolution of the Bretton Woods international monetary system and its institutional legacy.
title: General Agreement on Tariffs and Trade is signed
description: The GATT is signed in Geneva, complementing the Bretton Woods monetary order with a multilateral trade framework.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Bretton Woods System
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the creation, operation, and dissolution of the Bretton Woods international monetary system and its institutional legacy.
title: Britain devalues the pound
description: The United Kingdom devalues sterling, testing the durability of the fixed-exchange-rate system.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Bretton Woods System
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the creation, operation, and dissolution of the Bretton Woods international monetary system and its institutional legacy.
title: Major Western European currencies become convertible
description: Western European countries restore external convertibility for their currencies, a major milestone in the maturation of the system.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Bretton Woods System
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the creation, operation, and dissolution of the Bretton Woods international monetary system and its institutional legacy.
title: London Gold Pool is created
description: Major central banks form the London Gold Pool to help stabilize the official gold price under Bretton Woods.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Bretton Woods System
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the creation, operation, and dissolution of the Bretton Woods international monetary system and its institutional legacy.
title: United States adopts the Interest Equalization Tax
description: Washington imposes a tax intended to reduce capital outflows and ease pressure on the balance of payments.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Bretton Woods System
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the creation, operation, and dissolution of the Bretton Woods international monetary system and its institutional legacy.
title: Sterling is devalued again
description: A second major devaluation of the pound underscores continuing strain within the Bretton Woods system.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Bretton Woods System
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the creation, operation, and dissolution of the Bretton Woods international monetary system and its institutional legacy.
title: London Gold Pool collapses
description: The London Gold Pool breaks down and a two-tier gold market is introduced, weakening confidence in the gold-dollar framework.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Bretton Woods System
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the creation, operation, and dissolution of the Bretton Woods international monetary system and its institutional legacy.
title: Special Drawing Rights are created
description: The IMF creates Special Drawing Rights as a supplementary international reserve asset.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Bretton Woods System
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the creation, operation, and dissolution of the Bretton Woods international monetary system and its institutional legacy.
title: United States suspends gold convertibility
description: President Richard Nixon ends the dollar's convertibility into gold for foreign monetary authorities, a defining rupture in the system.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Bretton Woods System
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the creation, operation, and dissolution of the Bretton Woods international monetary system and its institutional legacy.
title: Smithsonian Agreement is reached
description: Major countries attempt to preserve fixed exchange rates through a new realignment of currencies.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Bretton Woods System
timeline_description: A timeline of major milestones in the creation, operation, and dissolution of the Bretton Woods international monetary system and its institutional legacy.
